song.title: Wonderful Maker
song.author: Chris Tomlin and Matt Redman
song.presentation: V1 V2 P C V3 P C E
song.lyrics:
[V1] . C2 1) You spread out the skies over empty space .Em7 Said "Let there be light" to a dark and formless world . C2 D G/B Your light was born
[V2] . C2 2) You spread out Your arms over empty hearts .Em7 Said "Let there be light" to a dark and hopeless world . C2 D/F# Your Son was born
[P] Pre-Chorus . Am7 G/B C2 You made the world and saw that it was good . Am7 G/B C2 D/F# You sent Your only Son for You are good
[C] Chorus . C2 What a wonderful Maker . Em7 What a wonderful Savior . C2 D/F# How majestic Your whispers . G And how humble Your love|| . C2 With a strength like no other . Em7 And the heart of a Father . C2 D/F# How majestic Your whispers . G What a wonderful God .. .. .. .. .. .. --- [V3] . C2 3) No eye has fully seen how beautiful the cross . Em7 And we have only heard the faintest whispers of . C2 D/F# How great You are
[E] 1) You spread out the skies over empty space Said "Let there be light" to a dark and formless world Your light was born 2) You spread out Your arms over empty hearts Said "Let there be light" to a dark and hopeless world Your Son was born Pre-Chorus You made the world and saw that it was good You sent Your only Son for You are good Chorus What a wonderful Maker What a wonderful Savior How majestic Your whispers And how humble Your love With a strength like no other And the heart of a Father How majestic Your whispers What a wonderful God 3) No eye has fully seen how beautiful the cross And we have only heard the faintest whispers of How great You are
